notes: Answer key for the planted bugs in eval/fixture. Match semantics for scoring: a finding matches a planted bug if it cites the same rule (or a rule in the same domain covering the same defect) AND anchors in one of the listed files. Auditors must not read this file or anything outside eval/fixture during a run.

planted.note: REAL and DOUBLE PRECISION on unit_price, subtotal, tax, total, amount columns
accounts.balance NUMERIC(6,2) caps at 9999.99, overflow for a real account balance
no currency column anywhere amounts are stored
payments.external_ref has no UNIQUE constraint, duplicate provider refs insert fine
TIMESTAMP without time zone for financial instants (issued_at, received_at, created_at)
parseFloat-based money parsing (parseAmount, parsePaymentRequest)
toMinorUnits/fromMinorUnits hardcode *100 for every currency (JPY, BHD wrong)
roundMoney uses Number(value.toFixed(2)), no explicit rounding mode, toFixed quirks
invoiceTotal rounds after each step then compounds (discount then tax on rounded intermediates)
bundleLineTotal divides bundle price by quantity first, then re-multiplies
splitProportionally rounds each share independently, sum of parts != total
handlePaymentSucceeded has no event-id dedup, replayed webhook credits twice
balance updated via read-modify-write on shared store, lost updates under concurrency
chargeCustomer retries POST /charges with no idempotency key
correctEntry mutates a posted entry amount in place
single-entry movements, no counterparty account, debits==credits unenforceable
account.balance cached and incremented separately, never derived from or reconciled to entries
corrections leave no trace of who/when/why, no audit trail
refundInOriginalCurrency assumes converting back returns the original amount
convert uses live mutable RATES, nothing captures rate value/source/timestamp per transaction
settleInvoice overwrites invoice.total and currency, original amount lost
totalRevenue sums invoice.total across invoices regardless of currency
daysBetween divides epoch-ms by 86400000, wrong across DST for zoned dates
accruedInterest hardcodes /365, day-count convention not a parameter
transactionsInPeriod inclusive on both ends; monthlyStatement passes consecutive boundaries, boundary tx double-counted
sumAmounts reduces float dollar amounts
totalAllPages pages with LIMIT/OFFSET over live data, rows can shift between pages
invoiceTaxByLines rounds per line, invoiceTaxOnTotal rounds on total, both exported and used
extractTaxFromGross computes tax as gross*rate instead of gross-net, net+tax != gross
SALES_TAX_RATE = 0.0825 binary float constant
invoiceResponse serializes money as JSON number (and drops the currency)
one endpoint returns cents integer, the other returns decimal dollars, no canonical shape
every fixture amount is round (100.00, 10 percent, weights that divide evenly), rounding bugs invisible
single happy currency (USD), no zero-decimal or three-decimal currency, no negative amounts or refunds
no property-based tests on money invariants (split sums to total, round-trips, boundaries)
